aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical components like reviews and a strong online presence.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Optimize the website's meta tags and content with relevant keywords for electrical, HVAC, and plumbing services in Arlington, Virginia.
Implement a blog section to regularly publish content related to home repair, maintenance tips, and industry news.

found: Business name and services clearly stated
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has basic local signals but lacks a consistent Google Business Profile and customer reviews.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile found.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website but lacks citations on major directories and local platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
List the business on local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for reviews and business legitimacy
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and actively managing customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing high-quality, locally relevant content and building backlinks from local organizations and industry partners
